PAN-176: each typed DSL slice is COMPILED to a real engine-validated prodigy-task (object-level program.js or a gen_hard family) and its grids drawn inline. Honest coverage — slices with no current realisation show a PLAN ONLY badge and the reason, instead of the old blanket "not validated". 22/24 compiled+validated.
